title: Home office
doc_html:
PART XI.  OFFICES

§851.  Home office

The home office is the principal office of the association.

Acts 1970, No. 234, §1.  Acts 1983, No. 675, §1; Acts 1995, No. 248, §1, eff. June 14, 1995.

PART XI.  OFFICES
§851.  Home office
The home office is the principal office of the association.
